title: eriosema edule
intro: Eriosema edule, also known as the African bean or horse gram, is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family. It is traditionally used in African and Asian herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriosema edule include reducing blood sugar levels, lowering cholesterol, and aiding in the management of hypertension and other cardiovascular diseases. Eriosema edule can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
